command: sudo systemctl stop gitea; sudo sed -i "s/^User=git/User=jose/; s/^Group=git/Group=jose/; s/USER=git/USER=jose/" /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service; sudo sed -i "s|HOME=/home/jose/gitea|HOME=/home/jose|" /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service; sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl start gitea && sleep 6 && systemctl is-active gitea && ss -tlnp | grep 3000 && echo GITEA_UP
